title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton: Turning Point
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Brook, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #25 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Brook, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #4, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't worry!! I'll protect you, nami-saaan!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: HOW DO YOU DO!! YOHO~ HOWO!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What a surprise!! It's been decades, perhaps,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Now, now, do please come in!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: I felt that down to my bones!!

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Brook, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #4, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton: turning point.
